extract.name: Workforce Transformation
extract.tagline: Six months to move the whole company off manual.
extract.summary: A six-month, four-phase AI transformation engagement that moves an operator-heavy company off manual work. It maps automation opportunities, wires a private AI workspace into the existing stack, ships seven to twelve production automations owned by different operators, and certifies up to 12 operators. Priced at $55,000 CAD for the full six-month engagement, secured with an $11,000 refundable deposit.
extract.pricing: $55,000 CAD full engagement, six months. $11,000 deposit to reserve, refundable up to 21 days before kickoff.
included: Phase 1 (Month 1): Executive transformation map signed by leadership
Phase 1 (Month 1): Top 12 ranked automation candidates with hour-savings and risk scoring
Phase 2 (Months 2-3): Private Shift U workspace wired to Claude, n8n, and existing stack
Phase 2 (Months 2-3): AI usage policy signed by leadership
Phase 2 (Months 2-3): Three production automations live, owned by different operators
Phase 3 (Months 4-5): Up to 12 Shift U Certified Operator credentials awarded
Phase 4 (Month 6+): Transformation review deck with verified business impact
Phase 4 (Month 6+): Transformation Guarantee active for 90 days
keyPoints: Structure: Six months, four phases, board-ready every step
A six-month engagement is the only way to move a whole company off manual. Pilots do not change a culture. Shipping does. (Marcus, Lead Facilitator)
Built for operator-heavy companies that ship physical work: industrial trades, logistics, construction, manufacturing (15-200 employees, 6-12 operators in scope)
Transformation Guarantee: we agree to a verified hour-savings target. If we miss it at month 6 close-out, we keep working free until we hit it
Seven to twelve production automations live in your stack
Automations are owned by different operators across the company, not held by one person
proof: $1.4M incremental annualized revenue - Borealis Mechanical (Edmonton, HVAC). Quotes took 48 hours; intake-to-quote ran inside two hours
38 hours returned per week - Chinook Freight Solutions (Sherwood Park). Four-day audit cycle reduced; 12 operators certified
4x faster RFI turnaround, win rate held, margin up 3.4 points - Whitemud Construction Partners (Leduc). Seven operators, seven automations across three offices
Typical output: 38 hours saved per week
Typical output: seven to twelve production automations live in your stack
extract.capgRemoved: STRIPPED all grant/funding content. Removed: the "net after grant" price line "about $18,700 CAD with the 66 percent CAJG reimbursement"; the deliverable "CAJG application packet submitted on behalf of company" (Phase 1); the deliverable/guarantee "CAJG packet inside 24 hours" and "Send the Canada-Alberta Job Grant application packet to my finance team within 24 hours"; the line "The Canada-Alberta Job Grant covers up to 66 percent of AI training, with up to $10,000 per trainee per year"; "funded through 2028"; "CAJG-eligible"; and the "Alberta operators / Alberta companies" grant-eligibility framing (genericized to "operator-heavy companies"). Kept the real underlying program and its gross price of $55,000 CAD and the $11,000 refundable deposit. The Borealis (Edmonton), Chinook (Sherwood Park), and Whitemud (Leduc) client locations were retained as proof, but the "Alberta operators / grant-eligible" sales wrapper was removed. No FAQ section exists on the page.
